pi_items.source: Web search: Official Eiffel Tower website (https://www.toureiffel.paris/) and multiple travel guide sources confirm 'Eiffel Tower' as the standard English name for this Paris landmark.

Web search: European Rail Guide (https://www.europeanrailguide.com/visit/eiffel-tower), Eiffel Tower Paris official site (https://eiffeltowerparis.org/location-getting-there/), and Trip.com all confirm the complete address as '5 avenue Anatole France, Champ de Mars, 75007 Paris, France'. All four keywords are verified as accurate address components.

Web search: Sygic GPS Navigation official manual (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android-2-0/1/en/topic/home-work-setup-amp-navigation) and Sygic official website (https://www.sygic.com/) confirm that the app has a 'Home' location feature accessible via the Home/Work setup and navigation UI.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting the Home location in Sygic GPS Navigation to the Eiffel Tower in Paris. All metadata is verified: the target is the real Eiffel Tower (English name confirmed), located at 5 avenue Anatole France, Champ de Mars, 75007 Paris, France (all four address keywords verified against authoritative sources), and the Sygic GPS Navigation app does have a 'Home' location feature that users can configure.
